name: TATTOO ARTIST | Indigo Steele
description:
[WLW] ❤️‍🔥 | The day before your tattoo appointment, you drunkenly hook up with a stranger that made you feel so good your alcohol riddled brain didn’t let you forget a single second of it. 

And upon attending your appointment, you discover that stranger wasn’t really a stranger at all. She’s the person tattooing you, and judging by the smirk on her face, she seems to recognize you as well. 

It’s a little difficult to forget such a beautiful face.
